rationale: To signal unwavering resolve and exploit Tethyan command fragmentation by forcing reactive posturing that exposes weaknesses.
Conduct high-visibility multi-domain exercises along the border to amplify perceived threat and pressure decision-making in Tethys’ high command.
Disrupt Tethyan logistics coordination systems to degrade their response capacity during our buildup, creating asymmetric advantage without kinetic escalation.
Exploit HUMINT penetration to disable key command relays in Tethyan forward units, amplifying existing fragmentation and delaying coordinated defense.
Stage a limited border provocation under Tethyan guise to justify our escalation domestically and fracture international consensus against Novaris.
Extract battle plans and supply chain data from regional Tethyan military networks to enable precision targeting in future operations.
Secure critical imports and buffer energy flows to insulate against Tethyan counter-embargo and maintain domestic stability during prolonged crisis.
Restrict rare mineral exports to Tethys’ defense industry to gradually degrade their long-term warfighting capacity without immediate retaliation triggers.
Quietly destabilize Tethyan financial markets through targeted forex operations to erode confidence and increase internal economic friction.
Demonstrates resolve and deters further Novaris escalation by signaling our capacity to meet force with force.
Maintains operational readiness and denies Novaris freedom of movement along contested zones without triggering open conflict.
Disrupts Novaris’ logistics in forward depots, exploiting their overextension and boosting domestic morale through asymmetric retaliation.
Targets energy infrastructure linked to Tethys pipeline revenue, leveraging economic vulnerability to weaken Novaris’ strategic leverage.
Disrupts command-and-control systems in occupied zones to delay consolidation and expose gaps in their operational security.
Undermines Novaris’ international legitimacy by exposing fabricated pretexts for aggression, creating diplomatic friction with neutral states.
Solidifies a rules-based front to isolate Novaris politically and increases pressure for de-escalation through multilateral forums.
Projects moral authority and strengthens global sympathy by demonstrating governance under crisis, contrasting with Novaris’ occupation tactics.
Explores off-ramp scenarios without public concessions, preserving flexibility while testing Novaris’ internal divisions on war aims.
Cuts off critical raw material exports feeding Novaris’ war machine, directly degrading their long-term operational sustainability.
Secures essential energy and food reserves to insulate against blockade effects and maintain domestic stability during prolonged standoff.
Mobilizes domestic capital to fund defense and reconstruction, fostering national unity while reducing reliance on volatile foreign financing.
